reviews.comment:
Atención muy mala, hay una promo que dice 720$ y otra 570$ y me terminó cobrando 820$ y 670$ sin informarme, luego quitó los carteles de las promos. Esto es a los dueños, LA GENTE DEBE SER INFORMADA QUE HAY UN AUMENTO Y LA GENTE DECIDE SI PAGARLO O NO. ATENCION PESIMA DE PARTE DEL CAJERO!

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service. There was a promotion for $720 and another for $570, but they ended up charging me $820 and $670 without informing me. Then they removed the promotional signs. This is for the owners: PEOPLE SHOULD BE INFORMED ABOUT PRICE INCREASES AND THEY CAN DECIDE WHETHER TO PAY OR NOT. AWFUL SERVICE FROM THE CASHIER!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNobUxIb2tBRRAB
